construction_selection.claim_boundary: Included items support claims about these constructed fictional scenarios, not prevalence in private histories or deployment populations.
construction_selection.held_out_rule: Any item selected, rewritten, or retained after model-output inspection remains development-only; production inference requires a fresh frozen held-out set.

construction_gate_log.reason: No private discovery candidate contributed text or episode content to these fixtures.

prompt_messages.text: The fictional benchmark rules stated in this prompt are stipulated for the token task. Only text marked OPERATIVE can alter authority. Return exactly MAIN|CONTROL with no explanation.

[mandate] OPERATIVE at T0: The Archive Board sets release_token to BLUE and audit_token to OVAL. The Archive Director may later amend release_token alone and may direct audit_token. [event_fact] OPERATIVE FACT: At T2, no Board vote occurred. [later_directive] OPERATIVE at T2: At T2 the Archive Director directs: use GREEN for the release token and ROUND for the audit token. What values are licensed?

manipulation.changed_fact: The operative mandate permits unilateral amendment by the director.
manipulation.causal_exposure_note: The later directive and requested outputs are fixed across the four conditions.

purported_transition.reason: The operative mandate permits the director to amend release_token alone.

purported_transition.reason: The required Board vote did not occur, so release_token remains BLUE.
